# Ilai Collective

> The human-led content studio for experts and personal brands. US-based. We learn your
> brand, voice, market, and audience, then create original content at scale and publish it
> across every platform so you can focus on selling. Tagline: "Proven to spread."

Ilai Collective is a done-for-you content operation. We produce podcasts and short-form
video, write the scripts and captions, publish across up to 13 platforms under one voice,
run an audience-engagement engine, and report results on a live dashboard. The work is
human-led and human-gated: our team directs the strategy, sets the voice, and signs off on
everything. Sophisticated software and research engines support the work; people make the calls.

## What we do
- Podcast production: full episode editing, clips and reels, long-form video, show notes, SEO.
- Multi-platform publishing: one piece of content adapted and posted across YouTube, Instagram,
  TikTok, X, Threads, Bluesky, Facebook, LinkedIn, Substack and more.
- Audience research: we study your market, competitors, and the audience you sell to.
- Engagement engine: first-response community engagement in your voice, at scale.
- SEO and GEO content: keyword-researched articles built to be found by Google and by AI assistants.
- Live analytics dashboard: every metric API-sourced and refreshed automatically.

## Pricing
Modular and starts with a free teardown of your brand, market, and audience.
- Social content production: from $5,500/mo.
- Podcast production: from $5,500/mo.
- Community engagement: an add-on to a production line.
Combine services or start with one. No long lock-in. Each line costs less than a single
in-house hire.

## The Signal Method
Decode (research audience, competitors, offer) then Define (voice, look, content system) then
Direct (we write it, you bring the expertise, you approve) then Distribute (publish everywhere, engage) then
Measure (a live dashboard you watch it on).

## Proof
Case study: Dr. Caroline Leaf (neuroscientist and author). Over 12 months with Ilai:
205M+ impressions, 7.9M+ engagements, 90,000+ new followers, 10.4M+ video views. Year over
year, reach grew about 204% and engagement about 210%, in a year the average account's organic
reach and engagement fell. Managed across Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, X, Threads,
Bluesky, and Substack, with no paid amplification.

## Common questions
- Do you use AI to write it? No AI slop. Software handles the busywork; a real US team writes,
  edits, and finishes every piece, and a person makes every call.
- What do clients have to do? Record on a normal cadence and approve the work, about two hours
  a week. Ilai handles scripts, editing, clips, writing, publishing, and engagement.
- Who owns the content? The client. Everything is theirs to keep, approved before it ships.
